svg.text: A little hedgehog in your menu bar
Clipboard history, favorite memes, and screenshots—all together.
Ready when you need it, quiet when you don’t.
Capture and mark up in one go
Everything you copy, ready to return
Text, code, links, and images are sorted automatically and found with a quick search.
Pin here or to your desktop
Your favorite memes, close at hand
Open the panel beside your pointer, choose a meme, and return to the conversation.
Drag to reorder, manage in batches
Capture the screen, keep the focus
Choose a window or area, then mark the details with pen, arrow, shape, or text.
Pin clipboard items to the desktop so code, to-dos, and links stay visible.
Adjust shortcuts, code colors, window opacity, language, and startup behavior.
Your content stays on this Mac
Bring the little hedgehog to your menu bar
